_doc: CANDIDATE-AGNOSTIC answer map for job-application inputs. GARY ships this as a TEMPLATE full of {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens — it holds NO real personal data. At onboarding, values are resolved from the candidate's CV + the NotebookLM RAG (never hardcoded here by hand). policy: FILL (auto-fill), FLAG (auto-fill but flag for user review), ASK_USER (screening/legal/eligibility OR not grounded in the CV/RAG — STOP, never invent). The engine appends newly-resolved fields to 'learned' after each application (ask-on-unmapped → learn → continue). NEVER fabricate: if an answer isn't grounded in the CV/profile/RAG or user-given, policy=ASK_USER. Methodology: docs/operating-rules.md + docs/career-ops-map.md.
_updated: TEMPLATE — regenerated per candidate at onboarding
_placeholders: Every {{TOKEN}} is filled from config/profile.yml + cv-data.md + the NotebookLM RAG. Delete this template's example rows only if a field truly does not apply.

fields.note: single field; if a SEPARATE country-code input exists pick {{PHONE_COUNTRY_CODE}} / {{COUNTRY}}
TOTAL YOE only — a specific stack is answered first by skill_years
If the CV credential has no clean equivalent in a fixed dropdown (e.g. a US degree scale), pick the CLOSEST honest option — NEVER upgrade to a degree not held. Flag for user review.
CEFR level; if the offer MANDATES a higher level than held, answer truthfully — this may disqualify → do not lie
Match the form's period/currency: monthly vs annual, USD vs local. If asked in another currency, convert from the profile floor {{SALARY_MIN}} {{SALARY_CURRENCY}}.
Negotiation floor — never volunteer below this.
e.g. 'Remote (preferred); hybrid/on-site only in {{CITY}}; relocation only with visa sponsorship'
e.g. 'Only with visa sponsorship' — relocation is a personal call; flag.
Eligibility/legal — the user answers. Depends on the offer's country vs the candidate's residency/visa status (config/profile.yml → location.visa_status).
Eligibility/legal — the user answers (typically Yes for on-site relocation; No for remote contractor).

skill_years._note: CANDIDATE-AGNOSTIC template. Populate from the CV/RAG at onboarding: one key per skill → grounded YOE (integer). answerFor() uses these for 'years of X' AND 'experience/proficient with X' (years>0 => Yes). NEVER inflate; a skill the candidate lacks = 0 => honest No / learning. Keys shown are common tech-role examples; add/remove per the candidate's real stack. Replace every {{N}} with the grounded number.
skill_years._gap_skills_are_zero: Any skill the CV does NOT support MUST be 0 (never claim it). If asked years for a 0-skill → answer 0 / 'learning', never a positive number.

learned._note: GROWS at runtime via the ask-on-unmapped loop: when a form shows a field NOT matched above, GARY asks the user, then learn(matchTerms, value, source) appends it here (and mirrors it to the NotebookLM RAG) so it is never re-asked. Ships EMPTY per candidate — the entries below are FORMAT EXAMPLES only; delete them.
